_comment: Reference schema for Conversation objects persisted to disk by ConversationManager

user._comment: One per user_id. Permanent — never auto-deleted. Any TREE_HANDLER process may use it.

process._comment: Ephemeral. Bound to creator_pid — only that pid may use it. Deleted after TTL or process death.

lifecycle.CLOSED: Explicitly closed or TTL expired — file can be deleted

ttl_rules.user: Permanent — never auto-deleted. Only an explicit close removes it.
ttl_rules.process: Deleted on process death (on_process_terminal_unlocked) or after process_convo_ttl_sec seconds of inactivity (watchdog TTL sweep)

access_rules.user: source_pid must be registered in TREE_HANDLER
access_rules.process: source_pid must equal creator_pid — no other process may use it
